summary: Iteration 3 frontend testing complete. All 4 requested changes verified: (1) subtle radial+linear gradient background on body/html (no flat solid), (2) bidirectional target-date <-> days sync works in BOTH first-run and settings modal, (3) ended state shows 'What is the next goal to crush?' eyebrow with prominent 'SET THE NEXT GOAL' CTA that opens settings; quotes remain visible, (4) frontend cleanup verified - only App.js/App.css/index.css/index.js under /app/frontend/src. Landing page + zip download work. Extension preview mirror works. Persistence via localStorage works after reload. No console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: None blocking. The extension code is well-organized and the bidirectional sync via bindDateDaysPair is clean. Consider adding a keyboard shortcut to open settings for accessibility.
seed_data_creation: Injected localStorage state 'remainingDays_v1' during tests to simulate existing dashboard and past-date ended state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Extension source of truth: /app/extension/. Preview at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL/preview-extension/newtab.html. Landing page at /. To test settings modal, click [data-testid='settings-button'] (not open-settings). To test ended state, remove min attribute from #settings-target via page.evaluate then set date in the past. Auto-accept confirm dialogs via page.on('dialog', lambda d: d.accept()) since Reset uses window.confirm.
verified_features: Landing at / with data-testid=landing, heading 'REMAINING DAYS', download-btn -> /remaining-days-extension.zip (HTTP 200)
First-run screen visible with both target and days inputs; defaults today+1year and 365
First-run bidirectional sync: days=100 -> target=today+100; target=today+50 -> days=50
First-run submit -> dashboard shows 100 days remaining
Settings modal opens with prefilled target+days values that correspond (today+100 -> 100)
Settings bidirectional sync verified both ways (days=500 <-> target; target=today+42 -> days=42)
Save persists to localStorage and dashboard updates
Ended state (target=2020-01-01): eyebrow reads 'What is the next goal to crush?', next-goal-button visible, quote visible
Body has radial-gradient + linear-gradient background-image (not flat)
Cleanup: /app/frontend/src has only App.js, App.css, index.css, index.js; no components/lib/hooks/quotes.js/constants dirs
No console errors on landing or extension preview
